title: premna latifolia var. mollissima
intro: Premna latifolia var. mollissima, also known as velvet tree or velvet leaf, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, and is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Premna latifolia var. mollissima include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are also used in traditional remedies such as syrups and poultices.
